get.description: Get a list of all the Projects in your account, with associated metadata

post.description: Create a new Project in your account

requestBody.description: A string in JSON format that includes all the fields to create a Project

get.description: Get all the properties of a single Project

parameters.description: The Project ID of the Project you want to get
parameters.name: project_id

403.description: You do not have permission to access the specified Project

parameters.description: The Project ID of the Project you want to change
parameters.name: project_id

requestBody.description: A string in JSON format that includes all the fields you'd like to change for a Project

403.description: You do not have permission to update the specified Project

page.description: Optional pagination argument that specifies the page to return. The default value is 1.
page.name: page

per_page.description: Optional pagination argument that specifies the maximum number of objects to return per request
per_page.name: per_page

account_id.description: The account the Project is associated with

created.description: The time that the Project was originally created

dcp_service_id.description: The ID of a Dynamic Customer Profile Service associated with this Project

description.description: A short description of the Project
description.example: Project for user sign up flow

id.description: The unique identifier for the Project

is_classic.description: If is_classic is true it means that the project doesn't have Optimizely X enabled.

is_flags_enabled.description: If is_flags_enabled is true, this project uses the new Flags-First user experience.

last_modified.description: The time the Project was last modified

sdks.description: For Full Stack, Mobile, and OTT projects, the language used for the SDK

socket_token.description: The token used to identify your mobile app to Optimizely (mobile only)

status.description: The current status of the Project

third_party_platform.description: The third party platform with which the project is intended to be used.

account_id.description: The ID of the account the Project is associated with

dcp_service_id.description: The ID of a Dynamic Customer Profile Service associated with this Project

description.description: A short description of the Project
description.example: Project for user sign up flow

status.description: The current status of the Project

code_revision.description: The current revision number of the Project snippet

enable_force_variation.description: Enables the option to force yourself into a specific variation on any page

exclude_disabled_experiments.description: Set to true to remove paused and draft Experiment from the snippet

exclude_names.description: Set to true to mask descriptive names

include_jquery.description: Set to true to include jQuery in your snippet

ip_anonymization.description: Set to true to change the last octet of IP addresses to 0 prior to logging

ip_filter.description: A regular expression matching ip addresses for filtering out visitors.

js_file_size.description: The current size in bytes of the Project snippet

library.description: The prefered jQuery library version you would like to use with your snippet.

project_javascript.description: The javascript code which runs before Optimizely on all pages

visitor_id_locator_name.description: (BETA) The name of said identifier that locates the visitor id

visitor_id_locator_type.description: (BETA) The type of identifer where the visitor id is located
